content.en:
After the fall of the Blood Robe Heavenly Ancestor, Ye Tian breathed a sigh of relief.

However, he knew very well that it was impossible for the Blood Robe Heavenly Ancestor to find him suddenly, there must be a Heavenly Ancestor who passed the news to the Blood Robe Heavenly Ancestor.

Therefore, the Blood Robe Heavenly Ancestor will rush back from the crack in the territorial sea boundary.

Subsequently, he investigated and learned the identity of the Blood Robe Heavenly Ancestor from the other Blood Transformation Realm Heavenly Ancestors.

"The Blood Robe Heavenly Ancestor turned out to be the master of the Gray Mist Heavenly Ancestor!"

This moment.

Ye Tian finally knew why the Blood Robe Heavenly Ancestor had returned, it must have been the Gray Mist Heavenly Ancestor who informed the Blood Robe Heavenly Ancestor.

"Gray Mist Heavenly Ancestor, you came to steal the Golden Liquid Energy Sea before, and it was already polite that I didn't kill you, but you even notified your master to come back from the territorial sea boundary to deal with me, very good!"

Ye Tian was completely angry.

......

Grey Mist Realm.

Ye Tian soon descended here.

"Gray Mist Heavenly Ancestor, get out of here!"

Ye Tian's voice ran through the entire Gray Mist Realm.

Wow!

The Gray Mist Heavenly Ancestor came out of the Gray Mist Realm, saw Ye Tian, and immediately felt that something was wrong.

But he couldn't hide, for a Blood Transformation Realm Lord, a mere realm couldn't protect anything at all.

"Endless Heavenly Ancestor, why are you so angry?

The Gray Mist Heavenly Ancestor asked knowingly.

He was a little worried that his master had snatched the Golden Muscle Fluid from the Endless Heavenly Ancestor and ran away, but the Endless Heavenly Ancestor had come to trouble him!

But his master won't be so bad!

"Gray Mist Heavenly Ancestor, you notified your Master Blood Robe Heavenly Ancestor to come, right?"

Ye Tian asked.

"It's not me!"

The Gray Mist Heavenly Ancestor flatly denied it, he didn't dare to admit it!

Boom!

Ye Tian punched it and directly bombarded the body of the Gray Mist Heavenly Ancestor, and the power of the Extreme Technique exploded, directly injuring the Gray Mist Heavenly Ancestor.

"Endless Heavenly Ancestor, you're going to kill me?"

The Gray Mist Heavenly Ancestor was terrified.

"So what?"

Ye Tian slapped the body of the Gray Mist Heavenly Ancestor that had just reunited.

"Endless Heavenly Ancestor, if you kill me, my master Blood Robe Heavenly Ancestor will not let you go. He was a three-time Blood Transformation Realm Heavenly Ancestor, and he would soon become a four-time Blood Transformation Realm Heavenly Ancestor. "

The Gray Mist Heavenly Ancestor tried to threaten Ye Tian with the Blood Robe Heavenly Ancestor, but he didn't know that the Blood Robe Heavenly Ancestor had fallen.

"Threaten me with your Master's Blood-robed Heavenly Ancestor?" Ye Tian sneered, "Don't you know that your Master's Blood-robed Heavenly Ancestor has fallen, otherwise why would I dare to come to trouble you?"

"Impossible, my master is a three-time Blood Transformation Realm Heavenly Ancestor, how can you kill him?"

The Gray Mist Heavenly Ancestor didn't believe it.

"You don't need to believe it!"

Ye Tian struck again and directly killed the Gray Mist Heavenly Ancestor.

Whoa!!!

One by one, the Blood Transformation Realm Heavenly Ancestors quickly arrived, and when they saw the corpses of the Gray Mist Heavenly Ancestors, their faces were a little ugly.

The Dragon Tooth Heavenly Ancestor frowned and said, "Endless Heavenly Ancestor, why did you want to kill the Gray Mist Heavenly Ancestor?"

"Gray Mist Heavenly Ancestor came to my Silent Black Pirate to extract the Golden Liquid Energy Sea, you should know, right?" Ye Tian said in a deep voice.

"Yes, but isn't this thing in the past?"

Many Blood Transformation Realm Heavenly Ancestor Dao.

"It's indeed in the past!" Ye Tian said angrily: "However, the Gray Mist Heavenly Ancestor actually informed his master that the Blood Robe Heavenly Ancestor had returned, and the Blood Robe Heavenly Ancestor thought that I had gained a great opportunity in the Territorial Sea Boundary Sea, and actually forced me to hand it over." If it weren't for some of my means, I'm afraid I would have fallen now. "

"Blood Robe Heavenly Ancestor!"

Some of the Blood Transformation Realm Heavenly Ancestors didn't speak, they did sense the breath of the Blood Robe Heavenly Ancestor, and they also knew about the Blood Robe Heavenly Ancestor's return.

But they didn't know that the Blood Robe Heavenly Ancestor came back for Ye Tian, and wanted to rob Ye Tian of the opportunity, this was indeed a matter of life and death.

"Blood-robed Heavenly Ancestor!"

A Blood Transformation Realm Heavenly Ancestor asked curiously.

"He's already fallen in the crack of the territorial waters!"

Ye Tian said lightly.

"What, the Blood Robe Heavenly Ancestor has fallen?"

The faces of many Blood Transformation Realm Heavenly Ancestors changed drastically.

The information that the Blood Robe Heavenly Ancestor had become a Three Blood Transformation Realm Heavenly Ancestor was naturally leaked, so they also knew that the Blood Robe Heavenly Ancestor had become a Three Blood Transformation Realm Heavenly Ancestor.

With the strength of the Blood Robe Heavenly Ancestor, Endless Heavenly Ancestor Ye Tian should not be an opponent, let alone kill the Blood Robe Heavenly Ancestor.

Then there is only one possibility, the Blood Robe Heavenly Ancestor was brought into the crack of the territorial sea boundary by Ye Tian and died.

Even the Blood Robe Heavenly Ancestor was killed by Ye Tiankeng, so they naturally didn't dare to fight for the Gray Mist Heavenly Ancestor, so they exchanged a few words of greeting one by one and left directly.

Obviously, it was impossible for them to do anything for the fall of the Gray Mist Heavenly Ancestor, and they tacitly agreed that this matter was over.

The other side.

Mihai Heavenly Ancestor and they knew that the Blood Mist Heavenly Ancestor had been killed by Ye Tian, and they were all afraid that they wouldn't do it.

After all, they had also thought of the idea of beating Ye Tianjin Liquid Energy Sea before!

Fortunately, they were slower, otherwise they might have been killed.

Since then, they no longer dare to fight the idea of the Silent Black Sea Golden Liquid Energy Sea, and even announced that they will not come out for a long time after a long period of retreat.

......

"It's quiet!"

Ye Tian breathed a sigh of relief.

After this incident, he believed that those Blood Transformation Realm Heavenly Ancestors would never dare to fight the idea of the Silent Black Sea again, and he could also be much easier, and he didn't need to pay attention to the safety of the Silent Black Sea all the time.

"I still have to break through my cultivation to the Second Blood Transformation Realm as soon as possible, otherwise I won't be able to cope with a Heavenly Ancestor of the level of the Blood Robe Heavenly Ancestor alone!"

Ye Tian said darkly.

And if you want to break through to the second blood transformation realm, you still have to find an opportunity in the gap between the territorial waters.

Time flies.

this day.

Ye Tian's Fusion Body Realm Vajra Snake copied his body and broke through to the Blood Transformation Realm on his own.

After his continuous operation, this Vajra Snake copy body has long been integrated into the Vajra Snake clan, and it will hardly be noticed.

Now, this Vajra snake copy body has broken through to the Blood Transformation Realm, and it is also qualified to participate in many things.

Moreover, he continued to make friends with other Vajra snakes in the Blood Transformation Realm, and he learned more and more about the situation in the cracks of the territorial waters.

According to his understanding.

The territory in the cracks of the territorial sea boundary is almost all controlled by powerful blood transformation realm races, and the Vajra snake clan is considered to be a good strength, but it is definitely not a top race.

Near the Vajra Snake Clan are the Heavenly Manatee Clan, the Ancient River Void Beast Clan, the Death Bone Dragon Clan, and the White Shadow Elephant Clan.

Among them, the White Shadow Elephant Clan is the top clan, much stronger than the Vajra Snake Clan.

After Ye Tian's efforts, he finally seized an opportunity and got the opportunity to enter the White Elephant City to trade.

He could go to White Elephant City with the trading team of the Vajra Snake Clan, which was a rare opportunity.
